name: Remote Library Client
description: Browse and play shared remote libraries — a Remote Library Server (by URL or peer-to-peer over iroh), a public Google Drive folder, or a public Proton Drive share.

library.description: Registers remote libraries — a Remote Library Server (by URL or peer-to-peer over iroh), a public Google Drive folder, or a public Proton Drive share — as browsable FeedBack library providers with remote metadata, artwork, and song sync.
